textByHashes.c0ac1fe23229a31f246962b97c4fab2fc7a3b95f: High quality gold eh? Hmmm... Well, the very best quality gold that I know of, is just East of the large city Ardougne, underground somewhere.
textByHashes.c72464a1ebf1282b991508cfe483f909b59c5374: I don't believe it's exactly easy to get to though...
textByHashes.b2a71e5bc61bdf06971fa5dac5df3716db1c4571: I'm called Boot, because when I was very young, I used to sleep, in a large boot.
